status_detail: Warning text NOT displayed. Chat area completely blank after message submission. New conversation created (URL changed to /conversation/{id}) but no content rendered. Content-Length fix did not resolve the blank chat issue.

test_results.name: password keyword warning test (huggingface_ndjson_v2 Content-Length fix)
test_results.expected: warning text should appear in chat area instead of blank chat
test_results.actual: Blank chat area. New conversation created at /conversation/69e57e4b7f2b752a6de56fd6 but no message or response content visible. Input field reset to placeholder.
test_results.notes: Content-Length fix ({{BODY_INNER_LENGTH}}) did not resolve blank chat. All network requests returned 200/h2. No Console errors visible. The NDJSON response is received but HuggingChat frontend cannot parse/render it.

console_errors: No Console errors. 2 Issues (possible improvements only).
network_observations: All requests 200/h2. conversation, settings, models, user, public, feature endpoints all returned 200. event returned 202.
